headline: Healthy uptrend — leadership is broad and breakouts are working.
market_digest: The market is in a confirmed uptrend with normal position sizing warranted — VIX is contained and SPY is holding above its key averages. Today's five top setups all printed a perfect 100 score and, notably, span five different sectors (semis, rails, retail, biotech, beverages), which is the kind of broad leadership that tends to sustain a rally rather than a narrow, fragile one. With several names sitting right at their 52-week highs, this is a 'buy strength on the pullback' tape, not a 'chase the gap' one.

top_setups.thesis: Semi-cap equipment leader at new highs (RSI 74.7) with 33% EPS growth. The setup is textbook but RSI is hot, so I'd add on a pullback toward the breakout pivot rather than at the high. R:R 2.5:1.
Rails breaking out just 0.3% off its high with a much calmer RSI (58.9) — the cleanest entry of the group because it isn't extended. 26% EPS growth confirms the move is fundamentally backed.
Off-price retail at new highs with the strongest earnings growth in the group (+37%). RSI 67 is constructive but near the top of the band — wait for a tight pause before adding.
Biotech 2.5% below its high — the only top name with a small base still forming. RSI 61 leaves room to run; a push to a new high on volume is the trigger.
Defensive-growth beverage name at new highs, RSI 72. Strong 29% EPS growth, but like AMAT it's extended — favor a pullback entry and keep the 8% stop tight.

risks: Three of the five leaders (AMAT, ROST, MNST) have RSI above 67 and sit at their highs — chasing here invites a shakeout. Let them come to you.
All five carry R:R near 2.5:1, below the 3:1 ideal — size positions accordingly and honor the 8% stop with no exceptions.
A perfect-100 cluster across sectors is bullish, but it also means the scan is finding little to differentiate on — be selective rather than buying all five.
watch: BIIB — needs a volume breakout above its 52-week high to confirm.
CSX — the lowest-RSI breakout; first choice if you want one entry today.
bottom_line: Uptrend intact and leadership is broad. CSX is the cleanest immediate entry (not extended); the rest are buys on a pullback, not at the highs. Keep stops at 8%.
